intro: The tide has pulled far out, leaving a maze of rocky pools glinting in the sun. Shells, glassy stones, and stranded curios litter the basins, but something large stirs in the deeper water beyond.
title: Tide Pools
description: A low-tide shoreline of rich rock pools. Comb them round by round for a growing haul, loose shells giving way to finer pickings and, deep in, a real curio, but every reach raises the chance a territorial Water mon sweeps in on the turning tide. Pack up early to keep the safe haul, or press your luck for more.

1.label: Comb the pools
1.tooltip:
(+) Gather a haul pool by pool
(?) Each reach raises the chance of an ambush
1.selected: You crouch at the water's edge and start sifting through the rocks...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You leave the pools to the tide and move on.

combPrompt: You have gathered {{combCount}} finds{{treasureNote}}. The water beyond is getting choppy. Keep combing, or pack up and leave?

push.label: Keep combing
push.tooltip:
(+) Add to your haul, finer finds the deeper you reach
(?) Higher chance the tide turns on you

foundShells: You scoop up a handful of shells and pocket the money they fetch.
foundNothing: Your hand comes up with nothing but cold seawater. This reach turns up empty.
foundPearl: Wedged in a crevice, a lustrous Pearl comes loose - worth a small fortune!
foundCurio: Glinting under the water, you work loose a valuable curio and tuck it away for later.
foundKingsRock: Rolled smooth by the surf sits a heavy, crowned stone - a King's Rock! A genuinely rare find.
foundMegaStone: Half-buried in the wet sand, a stone pulses with a strange inner light - a Mega Stone! You stow it carefully.
tideTurns: The tide turns in a rush of foam! A territorial Water Pokemon surges out of the deep - the money you have earned is safely in your bag. Drive it off and you can keep combing!
